message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>Through infection prevention and control (IPC) site visits to 23 LTCFs in Fulton County, Georgia, comparison between the Higher- and Lower-prevalence groups revealed significant differences in PPE and Social Distancing, with five specific indicators driving these differences.</jats:p>
title: Assessment of Infection Prevention and Control Protocols, Procedures, and Implementation in Response to the COVID-19 Pandemic in Twenty-three Long-term Care Facilities in Fulton County, Georgia

reference.unstructured: Arons, M. M. , Hatfield, K. M. , Reddy, S. C. , Kimball, A. , James, A. , Jacobs, J. K. ,… & Tanwar, S. (2020). Presymptomatic SARS-CoV-2 infections and transmission in a skilled nursing facility. New England journal of medicine.
